notes: v393 — Buy prices now snap to real ASX tick sizes. The ASX only lets you trade at set price steps — 0.1¢ under 10¢, 0.5¢ from 10¢ to $2, and 1¢ above $2 — so a computed dip like $1.4775 isn't a price you could actually place. Now every practice buy price rounds to the nearest valid step: 🤖 auto-pilot 🎣 dips, 🎯 picks, and the ✎ edit-price on pending orders. And any pending limit orders you already have are corrected to a valid price automatically the next time you open your 💼 Portfolio — the shares stay the same and the reserved cash adjusts to match (it never overspends). Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
